title: Cobblemon PokéPing
description: Receive notifications when specific Pokémon spawn, with Discord webhook support and in-game chat messages
body:
# PokéPing
Receive notifications for wild Pokémon in Cobblemon!

With the config (editable in the file or directly through ModMenu), you can easily choose which Pokémon trigger notifications.
You can also enable Discord webhooks to be notified when you are afk, for example.

## ✨ Features
- Shows notifications in Minecraft chat when selected Pokémon spawn nearby
- Edit config in ModMenu or ```config/pokeping.json```
- Optional Discord webhook support (text or embed messages)
- Can be disabled via config without restarting Minecraft
- Language support for: English, German
- **Version 1.0.4^ (WIP)**: Biome spawn checks for singleplayer and server (Not 100% perfect / accurate. I can only use Cobblemons spawn files with the biome tags (#cobblemon:is_grassland) on the server and compare whether the current biome matches this tag)

## 💡 Example Use Case

Want to get notified when a rare starter Pokémon like Squirtle appears while you are exploring?

Add "squirtle" ([Available Cobblemon Names](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/-/tree/main/common/src/main/resources/data/cobblemon/species)) to your list in the config, and PokéPing will notify you when it spawns. And via Discord if you have set up a webhook for a Discord channel.

## In-Game Notification
![In-Game Notification](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1yBBJgFW/images/db8568e986eae98a0303d97e1a54bc3d49bf9047.png)

## Discord Webhook (Embed Mode)
![Discord Webhook (Embed Mode)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1yBBJgFW/images/468a0b6bd89cad1e23041a22cc6a503fb9d9c2c5.png)

## Discord Webhook (Text Mode)
![Discord Webhook (Text Mode)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1yBBJgFW/images/4088ca29a0cd781db634347c9191d911de7407f7.png)

---

### 🔗 Dependencies
- Required:
  - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
  - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- Optional: 
  - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

### ⚙️ Tested With:
- Minecraft: 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader: 0.16.14
- Fabric API: 0.92.5+1.20.1
- Cobblemon: 1.5.2
- Fabric Language Kotlin: 1.13.2+kotlin.2.1.20

### Notes:
- Make sure to keep your webhook URL private - anyone with this URL can post into your Discord channel
